album_quality_notes: Treat BPM/key as soft guidance unless repeated renders show reliable adherence
Log provider route and settings with every render
notes: Cloudflare wrapper requires prompt and exposes lyrics, sample_rate, bitrate, format, lyrics_optimizer, is_instrumental; output is an audio URL. Validate live schema before generation.

output.notes: Cloudflare route returns an audio URL through Workers AI response shape; direct MiniMax output_format/stream semantics do not apply unless Cloudflare exposes them.

audio_setting.notes: Use Cloudflare documented enum values from live schema; MP3/WAV are documented formats.
